body:
## 🟢 Good First Issue: Add Color Theme: Cyber Kitsune — Beginner-Friendly Open Source Contribution

![Time: <1 minute](https://img.shields.io/badge/Time-<1_minute-brightgreen) ![Difficulty: Beginner](https://img.shields.io/badge/Difficulty-Beginner-blue) ![No Code Required](https://img.shields.io/badge/No_Code-Required-orange)

> 🟢 **No prerequisites needed!** You don't need to clone the repo, install anything, or write code.
> This entire contribution can be done from your browser in under 60 seconds.

**Labels:** good first issue, help wanted, hacktoberfest  
**Language:** JSON (no coding required)  
**Time:** < 1 minute  
**Skill Level:** Absolute beginner  

---
## 🎨 Add New Color Theme: "Cyber Kitsune"

**Category:** Community Contribution - Theme  
**Difficulty:** Easy (good first issue!)  
**Estimated Time:** <1 min

---

### 🎯 Your Task

Add this beautiful new theme to KanaDojo!

### Theme Details

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **ID** | `cyber-kitsune` |
| **Background** | `oklch(13.0% 0.058 295.0 / 1)` |
| **Main Color** | `oklch(78.0% 0.195 45.0 / 1)` |
| **Secondary** | `oklch(70.0% 0.220 310.0 / 1)` |

> 💡 **Vibe:** Fox spirit in the digital realm

### 📝 Instructions

1. Star our repo ⭐
2. Fork our repo 🍴
3. Open [`community/content/community-themes.json`](../blob/main/community/content/community-themes.json) in your browser (click the link!)
4. Scroll to the bottom of the file and paste the following theme object just before the closing `]`:

```typescript
{
  id: 'cyber-kitsune',
  backgroundColor: 'oklch(13.0% 0.058 295.0 / 1)',
  mainColor: 'oklch(78.0% 0.195 45.0 / 1)',
  secondaryColor: 'oklch(70.0% 0.220 310.0 / 1)'
},
```

5. Make sure the JSON stays valid (add a comma after the previous last entry if needed)
6. Save the file and commit the changes
7. Submit a Pull Request with title: `feat(theme): add Cyber Kitsune theme`
8. Link this issue using `Closes #<issue_number>`
9. Wait for review!

---

### 🚀 Quick Info

| | |
|---|---|
| **Difficulty** | Beginner / Easy |
| **Time** | < 1 minute |
| **Language** | TypeScript, JSON |
| **Framework** | Next.js, React |
| **Good for** | First-time contributors, Hacktoberfest |

> **No coding experience required!** This is a simple JSON/data file edit — perfect for your first open source contribution. No setup is required. 

**Questions?** Comment below and we'll help! 🙌

_This is a beginner-friendly, good first issue for first-time open source contributors. No coding experience needed — just edit a JSON file! See our [Beginner Contributing Guide](../blob/main/docs/CONTRIBUTING-BEGINNERS.md) for step-by-step instructions._

labels.name: first-timers-only
labels.description: Perfect for your first open source contribution

title: [Good First Issue] ⛩️ Add new Theme: Cyber Kitsune - Beginner-Friendly Open-source Contribution
